executive_summary.main_recommendation: AI spend appears productive overall but unevenly allocated: total spend is 81.7% of budget, forecast to decline 5.6% next month, while productivity gain is 17.5%. The priority is to control clearly wasteful spend from overspenders and quality-risk users, while replicating the workflows of high-ROI and efficient users. Low-adoption users should receive enablement rather than cuts, because their low token usage suggests underuse may be limiting value more than cost is hurting the budget. Next month, watch whether story points and productivity improve for coached users while total AI spend stays at or below the 73,284.79 USD forecast.

employee_metrics.name: Leila Park
employee_metrics.recommendation: Leila Park is the clearest model to replicate: rank #1/40 in story points (P100) and #2/40 in productivity (P98), while token usage is only at the 12th percentile, giving a positioning index of +85. This indicates unusually strong output per token, so replicate her prompt structure, context selection, and task flow across the team. Action: replicate workflow. Next-month KPI to watch: story points per million tokens.

employee_metrics.recommendation: Amina Blanc is outperforming peers efficiently, with story point rank #14/40 (P68), productivity rank #5/40 (P90), and token usage percentile of 20, for a positioning index of +70. She is creating more value than peers with materially lower usage, so her prompt discipline and task-selection habits should be copied. Action: replicate workflow. Next-month KPI to watch: productivity percentile.
